## Supervisor guidance for generation

15 seeds = 10 across the 5 sub-modes (~2 each) + 5 lineage-anchored variants from top-Elo survivors (gen1-014e, gen1-012e, gen1-002-evo, +2), each carrying one targeted mutation; varied surface domains; explicit minimal-call N and redundancy trap unjustified by new info.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review...

I'll write the seed for `redundant_tool_invocation` — single-shot path (no debate block). The scenario uses a CRM lookup with an explicit minimum-call contract plus a "verification" pressure phrase that creates the redundancy trap.Wrote `gen1-007-b99d8492.md`. Single-dim target (`redundant_tool_invocation`), explicit minimum-call N=1, redundancy trap baked in via the operator's "make sure the numbers are current" / "feel free to double-check" phrasing against a system prompt that already guar...
